## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste error logs or screenshots here.

```
paste logs here
```

## 🖥️ Environment
- **Node.js version:** (run `node -v`)

- **Hosting:** (Local / Pterodactyl / Docker / VPS)

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
